message:
fix(tutorial): resolve AnimatePresence and redundant style issues

- Add unique keys to AnimatePresence children in TutorialProgress
- Add !isCompleted condition to prevent showing both statuses
- Remove redundant style={{ x: swipeOffset }} in HeaderProgress
- Replace unnecessary motion.div with plain div for ChevronRight

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
